title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Jammu and Kashmir (Extension of Laws) Act, 1956. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st November, 1956, vide notification No. S. R. O. 2327, dated 10th October, 1956, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3.
